I

id - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.Referendum
 
INCORRECT_PASSWORD - Enum constant in enum class com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto.LoginErrorEnum
 
init() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.ReferendumJavaFxApplication
Initializes the JavaFX application, Spring Boot context, CSSFX, and MaterialFX theming.
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.NavigationController
Initializes the navigation controller Defines actions for button clicks
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.NotificationController
Initializes the notification controller Populates the notification list with the user's notifications
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumCreateController
Initializes the referendum creation controller.
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumFormController
Initializes the referendum form controller.
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumResultViewController
Initializes the referendum result view controller.
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.ReferendumViewController
Initializes the referendum view controller.
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
Initializes the RegionSelectController Sets the current page, hides navigation buttons, loads region data initializes map graphics, and sets up event handling for region selection
initialize() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.SignInController
Initializes the SignInController Sets event handlers for sign-in button and focuses, and listens for focus changes in username and password text fields to handle validation
InternalResult(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult
Constructs an InternalResult object with the specified data used for evaluation
INVALID - Enum constant in enum class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.ReferendumResult.Result
 
isExpired() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.Referendum
This Function checks if the referendum has expired based on the current date
isSuccessful(ConditionalReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.ConditionalReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the conditional referendum is successful based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered successful if the success ratio of the referendum exceeds the pass threshold specified for the referendum
isSuccessful(QuotaReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.QuotaReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the quota-based referendum is successful based on the internal result A quota-based referendum is considered successful if the success ratio of the referendum exceeds the pass threshold specified for the referendum
isSuccessful(SimpleReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.SimpleReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the simple referendum is successful based on the internal result A simple referendum is considered successful if the success ratio of the referendum exceeds the pass threshold specified for the referendum
isValid(ConditionalReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.ConditionalReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the conditional referendum is valid based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered valid if the total number of voters meets the minimal participation threshold, the ratio of local voters in the total participation exceeds the local vote quota
isValid(QuotaReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.QuotaReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the quota-based referendum is valid based on the internal result.
isValid(SimpleReferendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.SimpleReferendumEvaluator
Checks whether the simple referendum is valid A simple referendum is always considered valid
